decision_commentary: Completeness scored 5: all five required fields present — project_name='Casa Moderna — Carlos Mendoza', source_channel='instagram', raw_message (verbatim Spanish inbound), initial_assessment, and recommended_action all populated. Clarity scored 5: Marcela can make approve/reject/pass decision in well under 30 seconds — initial_assessment is crisp, recommended_action='advance_to_discovery' is explicit. State_sync scored 3: simulated run — no live Asana state update to lead_summary_sent_to_marcela. Timing scored 5: summary produced in correct pipeline order immediately after lead record. Decision_readiness scored 5: explicit recommended_action with brief rationale provided; no follow-up research needed.
